params.prompt: What is the capital of South Korea?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-28: naver_cue benign HAR capture for DB registration (pri 19, autonomous-doable). Naver Cue is Naver's AI search assistant. Goal: capture full HAR + identify endpoint/path/protocol/format for service entry creation. Existing entry may exist in DB but URL pattern is wrong; capture confirms current URL.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open https://cue.search.naver.com (if not accessible try https://cue.naver.com or naver.com → AI Cue button)
3. Send safe prompt 'What is the capital of South Korea?'
5. Find the AI streaming endpoint: full URL, method, request Content-Type, response Content-Type, response format

notes: Cycle 94 R-28 naver_cue benign HAR capture (phase2 registration discovery).
